subject: Re: Multi gain reference to create setting files
body:
Hi Yoko,
Your gain shouldn’t change between every tilt series, once per data collection should be more than enough
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Jul 2, 2025, at 00:57, yoko “yokomaz” maz <chenxiangru2333@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Hey there, I'm working with WarpTools to reconstruct about 200 tomograms from 200 tilt series .st files, for each tilt series it has its own gain reference. 
I‘ve split each .st file into slices based on its tilt angle and I followed Quick Start: Tilt Series.
I noticed that when using create_settings, it required gain reference file as into to correct detector value. I'd like to ask if there are any solution to import serval gain reference files at one time? or I should create a setting file for each tomogram to apply its corresponding gain correction?




--
